title: Phase 31BS — Approved Larger-Model Download / Metadata Verification

approval.method: huggingface-cli download (used hf CLI, the non-deprecated successor)

download.tool_used: hf (Hugging Face Hub CLI; huggingface-cli is deprecated, hf is the non-deprecated successor with the same arguments)
download.exact_filename_method: python3 -c 'from huggingface_hub import list_repo_files; ...' filtered by 'Q4_K_M' or 'q4_k_m' — single match, no sharding
download.magic_bytes_check: GGUF (0x47475546) magic present at offset 0, version field = 3 (GGUF v3)
download.extra_model_files_downloaded: none — only the Q4_K_M file was downloaded
download.download_warnings: unauthenticated request warning (HF_TOKEN unset); download still succeeded; non-issue for this phase

metadata_table.general.name: qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct
metadata_table.general.file_type_meaning: LlamaFileType.MOSTLY_Q4_K_M = 15 (per GGUF enum; Q4_K_M confirmed by tensor_type below)

raw_tensor_shape_table_layer0_context.note: All blk.0.* tensors (for orientation context only; no validation executed).

orientation_caveat.raw_display_interpretation: Raw GGUFReader tensor shape display [1536, 8960] for ffn_up / ffn_gate and [8960, 1536] for ffn_down is reader/storage-specific, NOT canonical. The dimension ordering is GGUF storage ordering, not necessarily (d_out, d_in) or (d_in, d_out).

canonical_orientation_per_source_of_trut.ffn_up: hidden -> intermediate; canonical artifact orientation (d_out=intermediate=8960, d_in=hidden=1536)
canonical_orientation_per_source_of_trut.ffn_gate: hidden -> intermediate; canonical artifact orientation (d_out=intermediate=8960, d_in=hidden=1536)
canonical_orientation_per_source_of_trut.ffn_down: intermediate -> hidden; canonical artifact orientation (d_out=hidden=1536, d_in=intermediate=8960)

raw_vs_canonical_check_layer0.ffn_up: raw [1536, 8960] vs canonical (d_out=8960, d_in=1536) — raw looks transposed (likely storage order [d_in, d_out]); orientation must be parity-tested before validation
raw_vs_canonical_check_layer0.ffn_gate: raw [1536, 8960] vs canonical (d_out=8960, d_in=1536) — same as ffn_up
raw_vs_canonical_check_layer0.ffn_down: raw [8960, 1536] vs canonical (d_out=1536, d_in=8960) — raw looks transposed (likely storage order [d_in, d_out]); orientation must be parity-tested before validation

orientation_caveat.conclusion: 31BS does NOT resolve orientation. The raw GGUFReader shapes suggest the GGUF storage ordering may be (d_in, d_out) for these weights. A future orientation parity micro-probe (Phase 31BT, only if explicitly requested) must validate orientation by comparing raw vs transposed against a model-derived W_ref before any tensor validation. No orientation claim is made by 31BS.

expectations_check.general.architecture: qwen2 (Qwen2.5 is a Qwen2 architecture with extended training; the GGUF metadata key prefix is qwen2.)
expectations_check.head_count_gqa: 12 query heads, 2 KV heads (Grouped Query Attention with 6:1 ratio)

actions_not_taken_upheld: no full tensor dequantization for validation (metadata/shape listing only)
no orientation parity probe (deferred to Phase 31BT, only if explicitly requested)
no anchor probe (deferred, only if explicitly requested)
no aggregate validation (deferred, only if explicitly requested)
no model files committed to the repo (model is in $SDI_MODEL_DIR, outside repo)
no commit/push/tag without explicit Matt approval (this is a PRE-COMMIT REPORT, not a commit)
rationale_for_no_change: 31BS is a download + metadata probe only. No tensor validation was executed, no Q2_K/SDIR artifacts were generated, no 0.5B reference metrics were re-derived. The 0.5B Q2_K and Q4_K_M reference metrics in accepted prior phases (31AY / 31BA / 31BM / 31BN / 31BO) remain unchanged.
next_allowed_phase_after_31BS: Phase 31BT — Qwen2.5-1.5B Orientation Parity Micro-Probe, only if explicitly requested. Layer 0 only, tiny seed/sample, orientation formula only, no aggregate validation.
forbidden_claims_upheld: no full-model runtime memory savings claim
no claim beyond metadata verification (31BS explicitly states that orientation is unresolved and deferred to 31BT)
